case_title: WELLS FARGO FINANCIAL ACCEPTANCE CALIFORNIA FKA VS. BEVERLY WYATT et al

docket_entries.description: COMMON COUNTS/OPEN BOOK ACCOUNT/COLLECTIONS, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF WELLS FARGO FINANCIAL ACCEPTANCE CALIFORNIA FKA FIDELITY FINANCIAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT WYATT, BEVERLY DOES 1 TO 20, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR AUG-08-2003 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  JUN-03-2003 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         JUL-24-2003
ADDED TO PROOF OF SERVICE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE CALENDAR HEARING SET FOR JUL-08-2003 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 212
MINI-MINUTES FOR JUL-08-2003 9:00 AM FOR DEPT 212
AFTER HEARING, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE IS ORDERED OFF CALENDAR.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR SEP-17-2003 IN DEPARTMENT 212 AT 1:30 PM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). THE AUG-08-2003 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
MINI-MINUTES FOR SEP-17-2003 1:30 PM FOR DEPT 212

DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE
